pub struct dynvec::encoding::Fp16
impl core::clone::Clone for dynvec::encoding::Fp16
pub fn dynvec::encoding::Fp16::clone(&self) -> dynvec::encoding::Fp16
impl core::default::Default for dynvec::encoding::Fp16
pub fn dynvec::encoding::Fp16::default() -> dynvec::encoding::Fp16

pub fn dynvec::encoding::Fp16::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

impl core::marker::Send for dynvec::encoding::Fp16
